property.name: originator
property.formula: (select usr.fullname from users usr where usr.userinstanceId = Created_By_Seq)

hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT event FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.request.model.RequestEvent event WHERE event.requestId= ?0 and event.name like ?1 order by event.id desc
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: DELETE FROM ROI_RequestCoreEvent WHERE (Description LIKE :description1 OR Description LIKE :description2) AND Name = 'Auto Adjustment Posted' AND ROI_RequestCore_Seq = (SELECT TOP 1 inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv WHERE inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId)
hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT event FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.request.model.RequestEvent event WHERE event.requestId= ?0
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO ROI_RequestCoreEvent(Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version, ROI_RequestCore_Seq, Name, Description) VALUES(:createdDate, :CreatedBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion, :requestCoreSeq, :name, :description)

DELETE FROM ROI_RequestCoreEvent WHERE ROI_RequestCoreEvent_Seq = (SELECT TOP 1 ROI_RequestCoreEvent_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreEvent WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND Name = :eventType ORDER BY Created_Dt desc)
